auth.note: Bearer-token-only. A request carrying only Cf-Access-Authenticated-User-Email (no bearer) is 401 for every endpoint below - see apps/platform-app/src/routes/api-strategy.ts. The owner of every write is always the token's resolved member.id; a body `ownerId` field is ignored, never honored.

errors.400: { ok: false, error, field } - missing/invalid symbol, direction, visibility, targetLow/targetHigh/invalidationPrice, bullPoints/bearPoints
errors.401: { ok: false, error } - missing/invalid bearer token

tools.name: thesis.judgment.append

errors.400: { ok: false, error, field } - missing note
errors.403: thesis exists but is owned by another member

tools.notes: Append-only - there is no update/delete endpoint for a judgment. A correction is always a NEW judgment row.

tools.name: thesis.promote

errors.403: thesis exists but is owned by another member

tools.notes: One-way ratchet: system -> public only. Idempotent if already public. No downgrade endpoint exists.

errors.400: { ok: false, error, field } - missing ruleText, invalid enforcement

tools.name: rule.disable

errors.403: rule exists but is owned by another member

tools.notes: Never deletes - sets enabled=0 + disabled_at. Idempotent on an already-disabled rule.

errors.400: { ok: false, error, field } - missing name, invalid visibility

read_only_pages.name: strategy.page
read_only_pages.note: My discipline rules + my theses/strategy cards (every visibility) + the circle's public-only section.

read_only_pages.name: member.card
read_only_pages.note: A member's public card: public strategy cards + public theses only.

read_only_pages.name: proposal.detail
read_only_pages.note: Owner-only, 403 for a non-owner's real id, 404 for an unknown id.

existing_but_not_yet_http.name: alert.crud
existing_but_not_yet_http.note: No bearer-gated HTTP endpoint exists yet - a skill cannot call this remotely today.

existing_but_not_yet_http.name: proposal.request
existing_but_not_yet_http.surface: local CLI only for creation (proposals.mjs run create); GET /proposal/:id (above) is the only HTTP surface, and it is read-only
existing_but_not_yet_http.note: No bearer-gated HTTP write endpoint exists yet for submitting a new proposal from a skill.

forthcoming.name: research.submit
forthcoming.note: research_tasks has no writer of any kind yet (CLI or HTTP); GET /research/:id today only ever renders the honest '研究执行 P8 上线' placeholder.
